location: Purchased for 1,500 Runes from the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold. Also the default starting shield for the Vagabond class.
tactics: Available in the Husks' base stock as soon as you first reach Roundtable Hold — no unlock condition needed.
Starting as a Vagabond skips the purchase entirely, since you spawn with it equipped.
lore: A dependable, easy-to-handle medium metal shield — metal shields have long earned battlefield trust for how well they turn aside physical blows.

builds.name: Universal early Strength block
builds.why: 100% physical negation, D-scaling Strength, and a cheap 1,500-Rune price make it the default all-purpose shield for nearly any early Strength-capable build.
